summary: Iteration 17 testing complete. All NEW features tested: DCA Bot (CRUD + scheduler execution), PDF Compliance Reports, NIUM Onboarding improvements (diagnostic, templates, corporate-constants, set-template-id). 24/24 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend DCA Bot page fully functional with all UI elements working.

issues: WalletConnect 401 error on preloadListings - non-critical, external service

critical_code_review_comments: DCA Bot CRUD fully working: create, list, pause, resume, cancel, history
DCA scheduler auto-executes plans - verified 1 BTC execution (25 EUR → 0.00041127 BTC)
PDF Compliance Report generates valid PDF with KYC status, portfolio, trades, margin positions, DCA plans
NIUM diagnostic endpoint provides full integration status check
NIUM templates and corporate-constants endpoints working (return NIUM API responses)
NIUM set-template-id correctly restricted to ADMIN role only
All DCA validation working: invalid asset, invalid interval, negative amount, nonexistent plan
CSV exports (trades, portfolio, margin) all working
seed_data_creation: Created and cancelled ETH DCA plan during testing. Existing BTC plan (25 EUR/daily) has 1 execution.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 17 features all working: 1) DCA Bot at /dca with full CRUD (create, list, pause, resume, cancel, history). 2) DCA scheduler runs every 60s and auto-executes due plans. 3) PDF Compliance Report at /api/export/compliance/pdf generates professional PDF with KYC, portfolio, trades, margin, DCA sections. 4) NIUM diagnostic at /api/nium-onboarding/diagnostic shows full integration status. 5) NIUM templates and corporate-constants endpoints working. 6) NIUM set-template-id restricted to ADMIN only. 7) Dashboard has DCA Bot link card with AUTO badge.

dca_bot.POST /api/dca/create: PASS - Creates DCA plan with asset, amount_eur, interval, max_executions
dca_bot.GET /api/dca/plans: PASS - Lists user's DCA plans with status, executions, invested amount
dca_bot.GET /api/dca/history: PASS - Returns execution history with asset, amount, quantity, price, fee
dca_bot.validation: PASS - Invalid asset, interval, negative amount all correctly rejected

pdf_export.GET /api/export/compliance/pdf?days=90: PASS - Generates valid PDF (starts with %PDF magic bytes)

nium_onboarding.GET /api/nium-onboarding/diagnostic: PASS - Returns api_key_set, client_hash_set, template_id_set, auth_strategy, recommendations
nium_onboarding.GET /api/nium-onboarding/templates: PASS - Attempts to fetch NIUM templates, returns hint for configuration
nium_onboarding.GET /api/nium-onboarding/corporate-const: PASS - Fetches constants, settings, programs from NIUM
nium_onboarding.POST /api/nium-onboarding/set-template-i: PASS - Admin can set template ID, non-admin gets 403

csv_export.GET /api/export/margin/csv: PASS - Exports margin positions as CSV

frontend_dca.Create form: PASS - Asset select, amount input, interval select, max executions, confirm button
frontend_dca.Plans tab: PASS - Shows plan cards with status badges (ACTIVE/CANCELLED/PAUSED)
frontend_dca.History tab: PASS - Shows execution table with date, asset, EUR, quantity, price, fee
frontend_dca.Dashboard link: PASS - DCA Bot card with AUTO badge on dashboard

mocked_apis.note: SMS via Twilio is Twilio-ready but not live (no Twilio keys configured). IBAN/SEPA banking rails are simulated. NIUM returns real API responses.
